notes: Common reply to 'gimana kabar?' (how are you?). Elided subject 'aku/saya' — Indonesian drops the subject pronoun in this idiom. English NMT typically reinserts 'I'm'. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: whether 'I'm fine, alhamdulillah' or 'all good, alhamdulillah' is more natural for the partner-pair register.
